rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0032 governs employment of uncertified classroom teachers. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.0032. EMPLOYMENT OF UNCERTIFIED CLASSROOM TEACHERS.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and teacher certification rule.
